creator: elenaofmanuka@hotmail.com
text:
I can not access the server because I have not have the password since the architect of my system has left Canberra without notice following a long illness. I am experiencing problems with the mail system which at george@hiddentreasures.info is not receiving any mail or faxes. Please send me an email with the password, or teach me how to change the password for a new one not knowing the old one, so a new technitian can access the server in order to diagnose the problem and attempt to fix it. At the moment the system continues operating except for the refered problem. Please help.
Thank you in advance
George Taubenschlag
Panache the ultimate market Pty Ltd
Canberra Australia
Please email me to elenaofmanuka@hotmail.com since the other one is not receiving any mail from 28th May
